query:
SELECT 
  id, name, status, leadsFound, lastSyncAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(lastSyncAt/1000) as lastSyncHuman,
  dailySyncsUsed
FROM outreach_campaigns
ORDER BY id;

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalLeads, campaignId, MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000)) as latestLead
FROM outreach_leads
GROUP BY campaignId;
